calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Eric L. Throne. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, City Housing, and Defendant, Arthur Sanders appeared pro per. The case settled per written stipulation and not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
